stemHtml:
There are two primary methods of flying to or from an NDB. Complete the following statement from the options below:

(1)___ may be used to fly (2)___ the NDB while (3)___ may be used to fly (4)___ the NDB.

options.a: (1) the needle down method; (2) TO or FROM; (3) the needle up method; (4) TO
options.b: (1) procedure turns; (2) TO; (3) the track made good method; (4) TO or FROM
options.c: (1) Homing; (2) TO; (3) tracking; (4) TO or FROM
options.d: (1) Homing; (2) TO or FROM; (3) tracking; (4) TO
